sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n58811" key="kommo/s2" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κομμός</orth> (B), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">κομέω</etym>) <sense id="n58811.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">care bestowed on dress</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">adornment</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
